PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-02-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Eiko Ito for Allyn Lai and James Baker.

Ms. Ito stated that they did not find a safe deposit box. The Court stated that it appears that the will has not been revoked. The Petition for Probate of Will and Letters Testamentary was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley.
